'''Mephitis''' was the [[Mephitisian]] homeworld. The indigenous people had no sense of smell. Offworlders found the entire planet's atmosphere to have a foul stench.

{{Planet-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
In Roman mythology, Mefitas was a goddess synonymous with poisonous vapors emitted from the ground in swamps.<ref>{{WebCite|url=http://www.unrv.com/culture/minor-roman-god-list.php|text=UNRV Roman Empire|archivedate=20100328104158|nolive=1}}</ref> The Mephitisians and their homeworld are a clear allusion to Mefitas.
